problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
